text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that sees the end of my third year with Super
Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The motherly Umamusume and greenhorn trainer
are now known as a top-class duo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So many people are approaching me... I have no
idea what I should do.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Who should I choose? Hmm, decisions,
decisions...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Could you offer me some advice for picking a
trainer? I'm having trouble deciding.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me. Have you been approached by a
ton of candidates?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, all sorts. From those who look like they'd
train me well to others who seem to be very
knowledgeable.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know which trainer would be the best
for my future.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm... For your future, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, the answer's simple! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Choose someone who you think you can do your
absolute best for.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What? I'm the one who has to put in the effort? Isn't the trainer supposed to put in the effort for me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I believe that it's more important to
prioritize giving over taking.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's a necessary part of racing—and you do want to continue racing together in the long run, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Th-that never even crossed my mind...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! ♪ Nothing, just a bit of chitchat.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll see you around! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I'm so jealous of Super Creek for getting
approached by such a gifted trainer.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
She mentioned giving more than taking, but there
aren't any trainers out there who give as much as
hers.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, did you hear that? You're a gifted trainer.
choice_data_list: I, too, was once a totally average trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's not true! I bet you were always gifted.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You just needed a little time to realize what those
gifts were...
choice_data_list:
Did you honestly think I was gifted from the
very beginning?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It's hard to say...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter whether you're gifted or just
average.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can still depend on you to stay with me to the
very end. Right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
For me, my desire to do things for you will never
change.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If anything, that desire might even be greater
than when we first met.
choice_data_list: Fine, I'll allow you to keep spoiling me.
Fine, I'll allow you to keep spoiling me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you! I was right about there only
being one way to choose a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You choose someone you want to do things for...
because Umamusume are givers. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another year, another new cohort of Umamusume
starting at Tracen Academy, ready to be
nurtured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Super Creek is probably the only Umamusume
who nurtures her trainer.
